hooks.command: jq -c 'if ((.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("/package\\.json$")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"ask",permissionDecisionReason:"This edits package.json. If you are adding or changing a dependency, stop and confirm with the user first (per CLAUDE.md) — verify the need cannot be met by the current stack: in-house CRUD layer, useAsync, ui/ primitives, lib/format, Tailwind/React."}} else {} end'

jq -c 'if ((.tool_input.command // "") | test("(npm (install|i|add)[[:space:]]+[^-[:space:]]|yarn add|pnpm add|bun add)")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"ask",permissionDecisionReason:"This installs a new dependency. Per CLAUDE.md, confirm with the user first and verify the need cannot be met by the current stack before adding any package."}} else {} end'
